name: Callaway Golf Co
business: Callaway Golf Company designs, manufactures, and sells golf equipment (clubs and balls), apparel, and gear under brands including Callaway Golf, Odyssey, TravisMathew, and OGIO. Products are distributed globally through on-course, specialty retail, wholesale, direct-to-consumer, and international channels.

exposures.sentence: Callaway designs, manufactures, and sells high-performance golf clubs, golf balls, apparel, bags, and other accessories setting the standard for performance in the game of golf.

We also sell directly to consumers through our websites and retail locations in Japan and Korea as well as to corporate customers who want to imprint their corporate logo on certain of our golf equipment products.

catalysts.event: Completion of sale of 60% stake in Topgolf and Toptracer businesses
catalysts.sentence: effective January 1, 2026, we completed the sale of a 60% ownership interest in our Topgolf and Toptracer businesses to private equity funds managed by Leonard Green & Partners, L.P.

catalysts.event: Corporate name change and ticker symbol update
catalysts.sentence: effective January 15, 2026, we changed our corporate name back to Callaway Golf Company, and, on January 16, 2026, we updated our New York Stock Exchange ticker symbol from MODG to CALY.

catalysts.event: Effective date of golf ball testing rule change for professional golfers
catalysts.sentence: The rule change is to be effective in January 2028 for professional golfers and January 2030 for recreational golfers.

catalysts.event: Effective date of golf ball testing rule change for recreational golfers
catalysts.sentence: The rule change is to be effective in January 2028 for professional golfers and January 2030 for recreational golfers.
